LJCCSParser.summary: Provides methods to parse source code for class, method and property definitions.

ClassName.summary: Attempts to parse a class name.
ClassName.returns: The class name if a class definition; otherwise null.

MethodName.summary: Attempts to parse a method name.
MethodName.returns: The method name if a method definition; otherwise null.

PropertyName.summary: Attempts to parse a property name.
PropertyName.returns: The property name if a property definition; otherwise null.
